title: vigna tenuis
intro: Vigna tenuis, also known as rice bean or adzuki bean, is a perennial legume native to Asia. It is a climbing vine that has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its ability to tonify the Qi and nourish the blood. The health benefits of Vigna tenuis include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and help manage diabetes due to its high fiber and protein content. In herbal preparations, Vigna tenuis is often used in combination with other herbs to create teas, infusions, and decoctions that are believed to promote digestive health and alleviate symptoms of menopause.
